title: EVOLUTION: A Journey Begins
description:
Assemble the Order of the Stone and forge your weapons in the ultimate battle for humanity and take down the WitherStorm. Will you prevail?

Get Quark + Zeta used in this modpack in their Discord server or at their forums website!
body:
Assemble the Order of the Stone and forge your weapons in the ultimate battle for humanity and take down the WitherStorm. Will you prevail?

Get Quark + Zeta used in this modpack in their Discord server or forums website below! 
https://discord.gg/vm/
https://forum.violetmoon.org/d/170-public-beta-release-quark-for-minecraft-1201-forge
